Adjustable Physician Protection X-ray Mobile Barrier.
Adjustable Physician Protection X-ray Mobile Barrier.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Adjustable Physician Protection X-ray Mobile Barrier.</font>
Mobile X-ray screen designed to protect operating physicians.
• Screen height adjustable by 11.8”. Includes safety catch to set in desired position
• Horizontal position can be adjusted to fit close to table.
• Four sturdy casters, two locking casters.
• Order with or without 9" x 24" Stainless Steel Instrument Tray.
• Modular parts can be easily replaced, including the lead acrylic if needed.

Physician Protection Mobile Screen
with 9"x24" Stainless Steel Tray

Physician Protection Mobile Screen
with 9"x24" Stainless Steel Tray

Adjustable Mobile X-ray Barrier.
Adjustable Mobile X-ray Barrier.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Adjustable Mobile X-ray Barrier.</font>

This window can be easily raised and lowered by hand as a result of the perfectly counter-balanced internal springs. The high quality steel construction and stainless springs provide a lifetime of trouble-free use.
Mobile X-ray screen designed to protect technical personnel from X-ray radiation.
• Perfectly Counter Balanced, easy to raise and lower.
Large Window Mobile Barrier.
Large Window Mobile Barrier.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Large Window Mobile Barrier.</font>
7 Custom colors as well~See color/frame part number below.
Tilted Mobile Barrier with optional "Reach-Thru" Curtain.
Tilted Mobile Barrier with optional "Reach-Thru" Curtain.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Tilted Mobile Barrier with optional "Reach-Thru" Curtain.</font>
Tilted Mobile Barrier with or without Reach Through Curtain
• Precision TIG welded for years of trouble-free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety
• 1.5 mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in “Sintra” plastic for easy cleaning and durability
• Modular parts can be easily replaced, including the glass if needed.
Ships in standard white unless specified.

table-duplicate-name.description: Tables should not have the same summary and caption

target-size.description: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

td-headers-attr.description: Table cell headers attributes must refer to other <th> elements in the same table

th-has-data-cells.description: Table headers in a data table must refer to data cells

oobee-confusing-alt-text.description: Image alt text must not be vague or unhelpful.

oobee-accessible-label.description: Clickable elements must have accessible labels.

Adjustable Physician Protection X-ray Mobile Barrier.
Adjustable Physician Protection X-ray Mobile Barrier.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Adjustable Physician Protection X-ray Mobile Barrier.</font>
Mobile X-ray screen designed to protect operating physicians.
• Screen height adjustable by 11.8”. Includes safety catch to set in desired position
• Horizontal position can be adjusted to fit close to table.
• Four sturdy casters, two locking casters.
• Order with or without 9" x 24" Stainless Steel Instrument Tray.
• Modular parts can be easily replaced, including the lead acrylic if needed.

Physician Protection Mobile Screen
with 9"x24" Stainless Steel Tray

Physician Protection Mobile Screen
with 9"x24" Stainless Steel Tray

Physician Protection Mobile Screen
with 9"x24" Stainless Steel Tray

Physician Protection Mobile Screen
with 9"x24" Stainless Steel Tray
Adjustable Mobile X-ray Barrier.
Adjustable Mobile X-ray Barrier.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Adjustable Mobile X-ray Barrier.</font>

This window can be easily raised and lowered by hand as a result of the perfectly counter-balanced internal springs. The high quality steel construction and stainless springs provide a lifetime of trouble-free use.
Mobile X-ray screen designed to protect technical personnel from X-ray radiation.
• Perfectly Counter Balanced, easy to raise and lower.
Large Window Mobile Barrier.
Large Window Mobile Barrier.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Large Window Mobile Barrier.</font>
7 Custom colors as well~See color/frame part number below.
Tilted Mobile Barrier with optional "Reach-Thru" Curtain.
Tilted Mobile Barrier with optional "Reach-Thru" Curtain.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Tilted Mobile Barrier with optional "Reach-Thru" Curtain.</font>
Tilted Mobile Barrier with or without Reach Through Curtain
• Precision TIG welded for years of trouble-free service completely enclosing the leaded glass panel for increased durability and safety
• 1.5 mm lead equivalent opaque base covered in “Sintra” plastic for easy cleaning and durability
• Modular parts can be easily replaced, including the glass if needed.
Ships in standard white unless specified.
